text.title: LinkedIn Ads Campaign Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is LTV ≥ $5k AND ICP seniority Director+ AND matched-account list available?

branch.question: What is the funnel stage of this campaign?

conclusion.verdict: run lead-gen form / document ad on matched accounts (MOFU)
run single-image / video on matched accounts (TOFU)

text.example: ltv=$28k, seniority=VP+, matched_list=acme_top500 → MOFU → lead-gen form on matched accounts.
